data.title: Corgi raises $108M, gets regulatory approval to launch startup insurance; uses AI for end-to-end operations.
data.description: Corgi has recently been granted a carrier license and is utilizing AI technology to provide comprehensive insurance services for startups, including underwriting, claims processing, and policy management. The company, headquartered in San Francisco, disclosed on January 9, 2026, that it secured a substantial funding of $108 million from notable investors such as Y Combinator and Kindred.

data.title: Global Top Brands (GTB) celebrates 20th anniversary, reveals winners in 2025-2026 with Chinese electronics brands leading.
data.description: In Las Vegas on January 9, 2026, the Global Top Brands (GTB) marked its 20th anniversary and announced the recipients of the 2025–2026 awards on January 7. Established in 2006 by International Data Group (IDC), GTB is overseen by Asia Digital Group and Europe Digital Group, celebrating top brands worldwide.

data.title: Stock market sees high with earning approaching for JPMorgan, Goldman, Taiwan Semi, Delta. Two major conferences, inflation data, and possible Trump tariffs up next.
data.description: The stock market is currently experiencing record highs, with notable companies such as JPMorgan, Goldman Sachs, Taiwan Semiconductor, and Delta scheduled to release their earnings reports. Additionally, there are two significant conferences, upcoming inflation data, and a potential ruling on Trump's tariffs to keep an eye on. The Dow Jones Futures suggest a widespread, robust rally in the market, prompting investors to evaluate whether their stock portfolios align with this positive trend.

data.title: OpenAI launches ChatGPT Health to improve user wellness, integrating AI with personal health data for better decision-making. More info available.
data.description: OpenAI has recently unveiled ChatGPT Health, a tailored AI solution intended to seamlessly integrate with personal health data. This specialized AI experience aims to improve user engagement and assist individuals in making informed decisions regarding their health. By leveraging advanced technology, ChatGPT Health enhances the interaction with health-related information and facilitates decision-making processes. For more details on this innovative AI solution, visit the link provided.

data.title: Strong Tower Consulting named among Washington’s Best Places to Work for the fourth time, emphasizing commitment to people and enterprise-grade AI, leading industry forward.
data.description: Seattle-based Strong Tower Consulting has been recognized by Seattle Business Magazine as one of Washington’s Best Places to Work for the fourth time. This achievement underscores the company’s dedication to its employees and inclusive work environment. Pursuing innovation, the firm is transitioning towards enterprise-grade, governed AI, positioning itself as a leader in the industry. Strong Tower is marking this milestone amidst a transformative period, emphasizing its standing as a cutting-edge AI company reshaping contemporary consulting.

data.title: FCPT buys GreatWater 360 Auto Care property for $1.2M via sale-leaseback, operator of 150 centers in Midwest and Texas.
data.description: In Mill Valley, California, Four Corners Property Trust (NYSE:FCPT), a real estate investment trust specializing in owning and acquiring net-leased restaurant and retail properties, has acquired a GreatWater 360 Auto Care property for $1.2 million through a sale-leaseback arrangement. GreatWater, based in Michigan, operates about 150 full-service automotive centers in the Midwest and Texas. This acquisition adds to FCPT's portfolio of properties.

data.title: AB CarVal expanded commercial real estate private credit in 2025 through partnerships, part of AllianceBernstein's Private Alternatives business.
data.description: On January 9, 2026, it was reported that in the year 2025, assets overseen by AB CarVal, a renowned alternative investment manager operating worldwide and an affiliate of AllianceBernstein's Private Alternatives division, increased their commercial real estate private credit capacities by concluding an exclusive...

data.title: Coastal Financial Corp (Nasdaq: CCB) acquires GreenFi brand from Mission Financial Partners, expanding services.
data.description: In Everett, Washington, on January 9, 2026, Coastal Financial Corporation disclosed acquiring the GreenFi brand of eco-friendly consumer financial products from Mission Financial Partners. Coastal Financial Corporation, traded on Nasdaq as CCB, serves as the parent company for Coastal Community Bank.

data.title: Georgia's Akins Ford becomes the #1 Ford Retail Dealer in the US due to record-breaking sales, large inventory, and customer-centric focus.
data.description: A dealership based in Winder, Georgia, which is family-owned, has achieved the highest national ranking due to its exceptional performance in Ford sales, a large inventory, and a customer-centric approach that has gained popularity across the country. The dealership, Akins Ford, located in Winder, Georgia, celebrated a remarkable achievement with record-breaking sales figures. The dealership's success can be attributed to its massive inventory and focus on prioritizing customer satisfaction. This milestone marks a significant accomplishment for Akins Ford and underscores their position as a leader in the industry.

data.title: Nicely Network named Best Reddit Marketing Agency of 2026 by Better Business Advice for impactful campaigns.
data.description: A Reddit Marketing Agency, Nicely Network, was named the Best in 2026 by Better Business Advice after a thorough assessment of agencies in Reddit-based brand marketing, community engagement, and search optimization. The award recognizes Nicely Network's excellence in these areas among competitors in the industry.

data.title: ReconAfrica adopts Shareholder Rights Plan with Odyssey Trust Company as Rights Agent. (Characters: 86)
data.description: Today, Reconnaissance Energy Africa Ltd. (ReconAfrica) based in Calgary, Alberta, declared the implementation of a Shareholder Rights Plan, in which the Board of Directors appointed Odyssey Trust Company as Rights Agent. The company, listed on TSXV as RECO, OTCQX as RECAF, Frankfurt as 0XD, and NSX as REC, made this announcement.

data.title: Ascendis Pharma at J.P. Morgan Conference highlights its evolution into a top biopharma firm.
data.description: - Becoming a prominent global biopharmaceutical company at a fast pace.

data.title: UGREEN showcases AI NAS ecosystem at CES 2026, focusing on smart storage, home security, and advanced charging.
data.description: UGREEN introduces a comprehensive strategy for enhanced connected living, across smart storage, home security, and innovative charging. On January 9, 2026, in LAS VEGAS, the renowned global consumer electronics brand, UGREEN, highlighted its vision of "Activate Smarter Living" at an event.

data.title: IEEE announces winners of 2026 IEEE Medals, honoring pioneers transforming technology for humanity.
data.description: In Piscataway, New Jersey, on December 10, 2025, the prestigious 2026 IEEE Medals were proudly announced by IEEE, the world's largest technical professional organization striving to advance technology for the betterment of humanity. These awards acknowledge the achievements of individuals around the world.

data.title: ArrowMark Financial Corp. declares $0.15/share monthly cash distribution for January 2026, payable on January 30, record date Jan. 21.
data.description: ArrowMark Financial Corp. declared a $0.15 monthly cash distribution per share for January 2026. The total distribution of $0.15 per share will be paid on January 30, 2026, to shareholders of record as of January 21, 2026. ArrowMark Financial Corp. is listed as Nasdaq: BANX and is an SEC registered closed-end management investment company headquartered in Denver.

data.title: Stock market hits highs with upcoming big earnings from JPMorgan, Goldman, Taiwan Semi, Delta. Multiple events and data to impact.
data.description: Major stock market indices have surged to record highs as investors eagerly await earnings reports from leading companies such as JPMorgan, Goldman Sachs, Taiwan Semiconductor, and Delta Airlines. Additionally, two significant conferences are scheduled to take place, along with the release of inflation data and a potential ruling on Trump's tariffs. This bullish momentum is reflected in the rise of Dow Jones Futures, indicating a strong start to the week ahead.

data.title: Dow Jones and S&P 500 hit new highs; aerospace, homebuilder firms stand out. Live coverage by Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: On Friday, the Dow Jones Industrial Average and the S&P 500 closed at all-time highs, setting new records. The stock market saw significant gains, with the Dow and S&P 500 reaching their highest points. Aerospace and homebuilder firms particularly stood out during this session.

data.title: Trump's mortgage intervention dropped rates below 6%, with average 30-year fixed rate at 5.99%. $200B plan to further lower rates.
data.description: For the first time since 2022, the average 30-year fixed mortgage rate fell below 6%, hitting 5.99% on Friday. This information, provided by Zillow, is accompanied by positive predictions, with experts anticipating further declines in mortgage rates soon. President Donald Trump recently announced a directive to Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac for the purchase of $200 billion in mortgage-backed securities (MBS). This move is intended to drive mortgage rates down and utilizes the $200 billion cash reserves held by the government-sponsored enterprises (GSEs). More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Largest real estate companies merge as Trump affects market, shareholders approve deal, no conditions post regulatory review. Shares spike.
data.description: Following the expiration of the regulatory review waiting period without any conditions, shareholders from both companies have given the green light to the deal. The merger has resulted in a significant increase in the stock prices of the largest real estate companies. This surge comes amidst market fluctuations caused by recent announcements from President Trump.
